Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** Author : Hichem Saghrouni
Internship at IRIT, 2018
Under the supervision of Ralph Matthes

Later continued by Ralph Matthes (R.M.), see the end of this comment.

Work on the paper
HINZE, R. and WU, N., 2016. Unifying structured recursion schemes: An Extended Study. Journal of Functional Programming, vol. 26, https://doi.org/10.1017/S0956796815000258.

The purpose of this file is to formalize in UniMath the recursion scheme
presented by Hinze and Wu, with their original approach making use of
liftings and conjugates.

For this, we formalize the notions of
- Distributive Laws, which are natural transformations between
compositions of functors
- Conjugates, which induce a binary relation between distributive laws,
defined by certain identities found in this document
- Liftings, which constitute a specific type of functors between F-Algebras

These constructions finally allow us to follow the proof by Hinze and Wu
of their theorem (found under "Theorem 5.2 (Adjoint folds)" in their
paper) and thus reprove it formally.


Added by R.M.: how canonically defined liftings compose


*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.UnitorsAndAssociatorsForEndofunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section DefDistrLaw.

Context {C C' D D' : precategory} (F : functor C D) (F' : functor C' D')
          (H : functor C' C) (K : functor D' D).

(** the definition of Hinze and Wu - no other laws required for being considered a distributive law *)
Definition DistrLaw (*{C C' D D' : precategory} (F : functor C D) (F' : functor C' D')
  (H : functor C' C) (K : functor D' D)*) : UU :=
  nat_trans (H ∙ F) (F' ∙ K).

(** a small help for later type-checking *)
Definition DistrLaw_data (*{C C' D D' : precategory} (F : functor C D) (F' : functor C' D')
  (H : functor C' C) (K : functor D' D)*) : UU :=
  nat_trans_data (H ∙ F) (F' ∙ K).

End DefDistrLaw.


Section OperationsDistrLaws.


C, C', C'', D, D', D'': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
DistrLaw F F'' (H' ∙ H) (K' ∙ K)


C, C', C'', D, D', D'': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
DistrLaw F F'' (H' ∙ H) (K' ∙ K)

  
C, C', C'', D, D', D'': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
(H' ∙ H) ∙ F ⟹ F'' ∙ (K' ∙ K)

  
C, C', C'', D, D', D'': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
H' ∙ (H ∙ F) ⟹ F'' ∙ (K' ∙ K)

  
C, C', C'', D, D', D'': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
H' ∙ (H ∙ F) ⟹ (F'' ∙ K') ∙ K

  
C, C', C'', D, D', D'': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
functor_composite_data H' (F' ∙ K) ⟹ (F'' ∙ K') ∙ K

  
C, C', C'', D, D', D'': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
(H' ∙ F') ∙ K ⟹ (F'' ∙ K') ∙ K

  exact (post_whisker lambda' K).
Defined.




C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
DistrLaw F F (functor_identity C) (functor_identity D)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
DistrLaw F F (functor_identity C) (functor_identity D)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
functor_identity C ∙ F ⟹ F ∙ functor_identity D

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
F ⟹ F ∙ functor_identity D

  apply ρ_functors_inv.
Defined.


C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
comp_distr_laws (comp_distr_laws lambda lambda')
  lambda'' =
comp_distr_laws lambda
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda'')


C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
comp_distr_laws (comp_distr_laws lambda lambda')
  lambda'' =
comp_distr_laws lambda
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda'')

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
∏ x : C''',
comp_distr_laws (comp_distr_laws lambda lambda')
  lambda'' x =
comp_distr_laws lambda
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda'') x

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
comp_distr_laws (comp_distr_laws lambda lambda')
  lambda'' c =
comp_distr_laws lambda
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda'') c

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
identity (F (H (H' (H'' c))))
· (identity (F (H (H' (pr1 H'' c))))
   · (pr1 lambda (pr1 H' (pr1 H'' c))
      · (identity (K (F' (H' (pr1 H'' c))))
         · # (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)))
      · identity (K (K' (F'' (pr1 H'' c)))))
   · (identity (K (K' (F'' (H'' c))))
      · # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c)))
   · identity (K (K' (K'' (F''' c))))) =
identity (F (H (H' (H'' c))))
· (pr1 lambda (H' (H'' c))
   · (identity (K (F' (H' (H'' c))))
      · # (pr1 K)
          (identity (F' (H' (H'' c)))
           · (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
              · (identity (K' (F'' (H'' c)))
                 · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c))
              · identity (K' (K'' (F''' c))))))
   · identity (K (K' (K'' (F''' c)))))

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
pr1 lambda (pr1 H' (pr1 H'' c))
· # (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· identity (K (K' (F'' (pr1 H'' c))))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c))
· identity (K (K' (K'' (F''' c)))) =
pr1 lambda (H' (H'' c))
· # (pr1 K)
    (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
     · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c)
     · identity (K' (K'' (F''' c))))
· identity (K (K' (K'' (F''' c))))

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
pr1 lambda (pr1 H' (pr1 H'' c))
· # (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c)) =
pr1 lambda (H' (H'' c))
· # (pr1 K)
    (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
     · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c))

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
pr1 lambda (pr1 H' (pr1 H'' c))
· # (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c)) =
pr1 lambda (H' (H'' c))
· # (pr1 K)
    (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
     · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c))

  (*rewrite <- assoc.*)
  (*Beginning of variant to : rewrite assoc*)
  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
pr1 lambda (pr1 H' (pr1 H'' c))
· # (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c)) = ?b
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
?b =
pr1 lambda (H' (H'' c))
· # (pr1 K)
    (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
     · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c))

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
pr1 lambda (pr1 H' (pr1 H'' c))
· # (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c)) = ?b
 
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
?b =
pr1 lambda (pr1 H' (pr1 H'' c))
· # (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c))

    apply assoc.
    (*End of variant to rewrite*)
  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
pr1 lambda (pr1 H' (pr1 H'' c))
· (# (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
   · # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c))) =
pr1 lambda (H' (H'' c))
· # (pr1 K)
    (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
     · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c))

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
# (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c)) =
# (pr1 K)
  (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
   · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c))

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
# (pr1 K)
  (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
   · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c)) =
# (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c))

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
# (pr1 K)
  (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
   · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c)) = ?b
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
?b =
# (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c))

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
# (pr1 K)
  (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c)
   · # (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c)) = ?b
 apply functor_comp. 
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
# K (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c)) =
# (pr1 K) (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H'' c))
· # K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c))

  
C, C', C'', C''', D, D', D'', D''': category
F: C ⟶ D
F': C' ⟶ D'
F'': C'' ⟶ D''
F''': C''' ⟶ D'''
H: C' ⟶ C
H': C'' ⟶ C'
H'': C''' ⟶ C''
K: D' ⟶ D
K': D'' ⟶ D'
K'': D''' ⟶ D''
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
lambda': DistrLaw F' F'' H' K'
lambda'': DistrLaw F'' F''' H'' K''
c: C'''
aux1:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C') (f : C' ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ F) f · lambda x' =
lambda x · # (F' ∙ K) f
# K (# (pr1 K') (pr1 lambda'' c)) =
# K (# K' (pr1 lambda'' c))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

  (*lois unitaires : composition avec l'identité, idF neutre à gauche et à droite*)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
∏ (C' D' : category) (F' : C' ⟶ D') (H : C' ⟶ C)
(K : D' ⟶ D) (lambda : DistrLaw F F' H K),
comp_distr_laws (id_distr_law F) lambda = lambda


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
∏ (C' D' : category) (F' : C' ⟶ D') (H : C' ⟶ C)
(K : D' ⟶ D) (lambda : DistrLaw F F' H K),
comp_distr_laws (id_distr_law F) lambda = lambda

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
C', D': category
∏ (F' : C' ⟶ D') (H : C' ⟶ C) (K : D' ⟶ D)
(lambda : DistrLaw F F' H K),
comp_distr_laws (id_distr_law F) lambda = lambda

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
∏ lambda : DistrLaw F F' H K,
comp_distr_laws (id_distr_law F) lambda = lambda

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
comp_distr_laws (id_distr_law F) lambda = lambda

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
∏ x : C',
comp_distr_laws (id_distr_law F) lambda x = lambda x

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
comp_distr_laws (id_distr_law F) lambda c = lambda c

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
identity (F (H c))
· (identity (F (pr1 H c)) · identity (F (pr1 H c))
   · (identity (F (H c)) · pr1 lambda c)
   · identity (K (F' c))) = lambda c

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
pr1 lambda c · identity (K (F' c)) = lambda c

  apply id_right.
Qed.

(* Locate "·". *)


C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
∏ (C D : category) (F : C ⟶ D) (H : C' ⟶ C)
(K : D' ⟶ D) (lambda : DistrLaw F F' H K),
comp_distr_laws lambda (id_distr_law F') = lambda


C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
∏ (C D : category) (F : C ⟶ D) (H : C' ⟶ C)
(K : D' ⟶ D) (lambda : DistrLaw F F' H K),
comp_distr_laws lambda (id_distr_law F') = lambda

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
∏ (F : C ⟶ D) (H : C' ⟶ C) (K : D' ⟶ D)
(lambda : DistrLaw F F' H K),
comp_distr_laws lambda (id_distr_law F') = lambda

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
∏ lambda : DistrLaw F F' H K,
comp_distr_laws lambda (id_distr_law F') = lambda

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
comp_distr_laws lambda (id_distr_law F') = lambda

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
∏ x : C',
comp_distr_laws lambda (id_distr_law F') x = lambda x

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
comp_distr_laws lambda (id_distr_law F') c = lambda c

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
identity (F (H c))
· (pr1 lambda c
   · (identity (K (F' c))
      · # (pr1 K) (identity (F' c) · identity (F' c)))
   · identity (K (F' c))) = lambda c

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
pr1 lambda c · # (pr1 K) (identity (F' c))
· identity (K (F' c)) = lambda c

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
pr1 lambda c · # (pr1 K) (identity (F' c)) = lambda c

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
pr1 lambda c · # (pr1 K) (identity (F' c)) = ?b
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
?b = lambda c

  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
pr1 lambda c · # (pr1 K) (identity (F' c)) = ?b
 
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
# (pr1 K) (identity (F' c)) = ?f'

    apply functor_id.
  
C', D': category
F': C' ⟶ D'
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: C' ⟶ C
K: D' ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw F F' H K
c: C'
pr1 lambda c · identity (K (F' c)) = lambda c

  apply id_right.
Qed.

End OperationsDistrLaws.

Section Conjugates.


C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
f = φ_adj_inv h g → φ_adj h f = g


C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
f = φ_adj_inv h g → φ_adj h f = g

  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
φ_adj h f = g

  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
φ_adj h f = g

  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
φ_adj h f = g

  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
unit_from_are_adjoints h (R b)
· # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h b) =
identity (R b)
φ_adj h f = g

  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b)
· # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h b) =
identity (R b)
φ_adj h f = g

  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
φ_adj h f = g

  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # R f = g

A: D
B: C

R: C ⟶ D

f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧

triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,

f = φ_adj_inv h g

triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # R f = g

A: D
B: C

triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
f = φ_adj_inv h g
 exact p.
  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧

p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # R f = g
 
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # R (φ_adj_inv h g) = g

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
unit_from_are_adjoints h A
· # R (# L g · counit_from_are_adjoints h B) = g

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
unit_from_are_adjoints h A
· (# R (# L g) · # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B)) =
g

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
unit_from_are_adjoints h A
· (# (L ∙ R) g · # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B)) =
g

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # (L ∙ R) g
· # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B) = g

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # (L ∙ R) g
· # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B) = g

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # (L ∙ R) g
· # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B) = ?b
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
?b = g

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # (L ∙ R) g
· # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B) = ?b
 
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # (L ∙ R) g = ?f'

      
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
?f' = unit_from_are_adjoints h A · # (L ∙ R) g

      apply Hη.
    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
# (functor_identity D) g · η (R B)
· # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B) = g

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
# (functor_identity D) g · η (R B)
· # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B) =
g · identity (R B)

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
# (functor_identity D) g
· (η (R B) · # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B)) =
g · identity (R B)

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: f = φ_adj_inv h g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_right:= triangle_id_right_ad h: ∏ b : C,
η (R b) · # R (ε b) = identity (R b)
hyp: f = φ_adj_inv h g
Hη:= nat_trans_ax η: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f · η x' =
η x · # (L ∙ R) f
η (R B) · # R (counit_from_are_adjoints h B) =
identity (R B)

    exact (triangle_right B).
Qed.


C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
φ_adj h f = g → f = φ_adj_inv h g

B: C

R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
φ_adj h f = g → f = φ_adj_inv h g

h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
f = φ_adj_inv h g

A: D

h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g

f = φ_adj_inv h g

A: D

R: C ⟶ D

f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g

f = φ_adj_inv h g

  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
f = φ_adj_inv h g

  
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
f = # L g · counit_from_are_adjoints h B

φ_adj h f = g

    exact p.

· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =

hyp: g = φ_adj h f
f = # L g · counit_from_are_adjoints h B

R: C ⟶ D

f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧

f =

· counit_from_are_adjoints h B

f =

· counit_from_are_adjoints h B

A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D

f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =

hyp: g = φ_adj h f
f =

· (# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h B)

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f
Hε:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
f =
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h A)
· (# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h B)

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f
Hε:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h A)
· (# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h B) = f

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f
Hε:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h A)
· (# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h B) = ?b
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧

p: φ_adj h f = g

triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f
Hε:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
?b = f

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧

# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f

# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h A)
· (# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h B) = ?b
 
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f
Hε:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h B = ?f'

      apply Hε.
    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f
Hε:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h A)
· (ε (L A) · # (functor_identity C) f) = f

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f
Hε:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h A)
· (ε (L A) · # (functor_identity C) f) =
identity (L A) · f

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f
Hε:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h A) · ε (L A)
· # (functor_identity C) f = identity (L A) · f

    
C, D: category
A: D
B: C
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
p: φ_adj h f = g
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
triangle_left:= triangle_id_left_ad h: ∏ a : D,
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h a)
· counit_from_are_adjoints h (L a) =
identity (L a)
hyp: g = φ_adj h f
Hε:= nat_trans_ax ε: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · ε x' =
ε x · # (functor_identity C) f
# L (unit_from_are_adjoints h A) · ε (L A) =
identity (L A)

    exact (triangle_left A).
Qed.

(*  Locate "-->".
  Print φ_adj.
  Print Adjunctions.φ_adj. *)

(* Condition 3.11a in Hinze & Wu *)
Definition are_conjugates {C C' D D' : category} {L : functor D C} {R : functor C D}
           {L' : functor D' C'} {R' : functor C' D'}{H : functor C C'} {K : functor D D' }
           (h : are_adjoints L R) (h' : are_adjoints L' R')
           (σ : DistrLaw L' L K H) (τ : DistrLaw K H R R') : UU :=
  ∏ (A : D) (B : C) (f : (L A) --> B),
  φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · #H f) = #K (φ_adj h f) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B.

(* Condition 3.11b in Hinze & Wu *)
Definition are_conjugates' {C C' D D' : category} {L : functor D C} {R : functor C D}
           {L' : functor D' C'} {R' : functor C' D'}  {H : functor C C'} {K : functor D D' }
           (h : are_adjoints L R) (h' : are_adjoints L' R')
           (σ : DistrLaw L' L K H) (τ : DistrLaw K H R R') : UU :=
  ∏ (A : D) (B : C) (g : A --> R B),
  nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · #H (φ_adj_inv h g) = φ_adj_inv h' (#K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B ).

(* Locate "×". *)



C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
isaprop (are_conjugates h h' σ τ)


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
isaprop (are_conjugates h h' σ τ)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d: D
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ (B : C) (f : C ⟦ L d, B ⟧),
   φ_adj h'
     (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ d · # H f) =
   # K (φ_adj h f) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d: D
c: C
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ f : C ⟦ L d, c ⟧,
   φ_adj h'
     (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ d · # H f) =
   # K (φ_adj h f) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ c)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d: D
c: C
f: C ⟦ L d, c ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (φ_adj h'
     (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ d · # H f) =
   # K (φ_adj h f) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ c)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

(# K (φ_adj h (φ_adj_inv h g)) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B) =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H (φ_adj_inv h g)
hyp2: # K (φ_adj h (φ_adj_inv h g)) = # K g
?f = # K (φ_adj h (φ_adj_inv h g))

L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'

h': are_adjoints L' R'

P: ∏ (A : D) (B : C) (f : C ⟦ L A, B ⟧),
φ_adj h'
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H f) =
# K (φ_adj h f)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B

B: C

nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H (φ_adj_inv h g)
hyp2: # K (φ_adj h (φ_adj_inv h g)) = # K g
# K (φ_adj h (φ_adj_inv h g)) = ?f

        apply hyp2.

  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)
A: D
B: C
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
hyp: φ_adj h' (pr1 σ A · # H (φ_adj_inv h (φ_adj h f))) =
# K (φ_adj h f) · pr1 τ B
φ_adj_inv h (φ_adj h f) = ?Goal0

      apply φ_adj_inv_after_φ_adj.
    
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
P: ∏ (A : D) (B : C) (g : D ⟦ A, R B ⟧),
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A
· # H (φ_adj_inv h g) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)
A: D
B: C
f: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
hyp: φ_adj h' (pr1 σ A · # H f) = # K (φ_adj h f) · pr1 τ B
φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H f) =
# K (φ_adj h f) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B

    exact hyp.
Qed.


Definition σ_data_from_τ {C C' D D' : category} {L : functor D C} {R : functor C D}
           {L' : functor D' C'} {R' : functor C' D'} {H : functor C C'} {K : functor D D' }
           (h : are_adjoints L R) (h' : are_adjoints L' R')
           (τ : DistrLaw K H R R') : DistrLaw_data L' L K H :=
  λ A : D, φ_adj_inv h' (#K (unit_from_are_adjoints h A) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A)).


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
is_nat_trans (K ∙ L') (L ∙ H) (σ_data_from_τ h h' τ)


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
is_nat_trans (K ∙ L') (L ∙ H) (σ_data_from_τ h h' τ)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (K ∙ L') f · σ_data_from_τ h h' τ x' =
σ_data_from_τ h h' τ x · # (L ∙ H) f

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
# (K ∙ L') f · σ_data_from_τ h h' τ d' =
σ_data_from_τ h h' τ d · # (L ∙ H) f

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
# (K ∙ L') f
· φ_adj_inv h'
    (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
     · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d')) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
   · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d))
· # (L ∙ H) f

· φ_adj_inv h'
    (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
     · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d')) = ?b

φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
   · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d))
· # (L ∙ H) f

L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D

# L' (# K f)
· φ_adj_inv h'
    (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
     · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d'))

    apply φ_adj_inv_natural_precomp.
  
C, C', D, D': category

  (# K f
   · (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
      · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d'))) =

  (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
   · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d))
· # (L ∙ H) f

  (*simpl.*)

   · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d))
· # (L ∙ H) f =

  (# K f
   · (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
      · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d')))

K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
   · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d))
· # (L ∙ H) f = ?b
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
?b =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K f
   · (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
      · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d')))

φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
   · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d))
· # (L ∙ H) f = ?b

· # (L ∙ H) f

   · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d))
· # H (# L f)

    apply φ_adj_inv_natural_postcomp.
  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D

R': C' ⟶ D'

h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
   · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d)
   · # R' (# H (# L f))) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K f
   · (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
      · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d')))

· (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d')

  (* Variant:
    set (Kcompax1 := pr2 K).
    set (Kcompax2 := pr2  (pr2 K)).
    unfold is_functor in Kcompax1.
    unfold functor_compax in Kcompax2.

    apply Kcompax2.

C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
# K (f · unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d') = ?b
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
?b =
# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d)
· # R' (# H (# L f))

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
?b =
# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d)
· # R' (# H (# L f))

    
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
?b =
# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d)
· # R' (# H (# L f))

    
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
?b =
# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d)
· # (H ∙ R') (# L f)

    (*equals by defintion*)
    (*Variant : replace (# R' (# H (# L f))) with ( # (H ∙ R') (#L f)). + proof that we can replace, ie find a path between the two*)
    
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
?b =
# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d)
   · # (H ∙ R') (# L f))

    
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
?f =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d)
· # (H ∙ R') (# L f)

    (*exact (Hτ _ _ _).*)
    apply Hτ.
  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
# K (f · unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d') =
# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d)
· (# (R ∙ K) (# L f) · τ (L d'))

R: C ⟶ D

d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
# K (f · unit_from_are_adjoints h d')
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L d') =
# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d) · # (R ∙ K) (# L f)
· τ (L d')

R': C' ⟶ D'

τ: DistrLaw K H R R'

f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
?b =
# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d) · # K (# (L ∙ R) f)

    use functor_comp.
  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
# K (f · unit_from_are_adjoints h d') =
# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h d · # (L ∙ R) f)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
f · unit_from_are_adjoints h d' =
unit_from_are_adjoints h d · # (L ∙ R) f

  (*apply pathsinv0.*)
  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
d, d': D
f: D ⟦ d, d' ⟧
Hη:= nat_trans_ax (unit_from_are_adjoints h): ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity D) f
· unit_from_are_adjoints h x' =
unit_from_are_adjoints h x · # (L ∙ R) f
f · unit_from_are_adjoints h d' =
unit_from_are_adjoints h d · # (L ∙ R) f

  apply Hη.
Defined.


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
DistrLaw L' L K H


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
DistrLaw L' L K H

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
is_nat_trans (K ∙ L') (L ∙ H) (σ_data_from_τ h h' τ)

  apply is_nat_trans_σ_data_from_τ.
Defined.


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
are_conjugates' h h' (σ_from_τ h h' τ) τ


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
are_conjugates' h h' (σ_from_τ h h' τ) τ

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
∏ (A : D) (B : C) (g : D ⟦ A, R B ⟧),
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (σ_from_τ h h' τ) A
· # H (φ_adj_inv h g) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (σ_from_τ h h' τ) A
· # H (φ_adj_inv h g) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
  (make_nat_trans (K ∙ L') (L ∙ H)
     (σ_data_from_τ h h' τ)
     (is_nat_trans_σ_data_from_τ h h' τ)) A
· # H (φ_adj_inv h g) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
σ_data_from_τ h h' τ A · # H (φ_adj_inv h g) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (unit_from_are_adjoints h A)
   · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A))
· # H (φ_adj_inv h g) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (η A) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A))
· # H (φ_adj_inv h g) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (η A) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A))
· # H (φ_adj_inv h g) = ?b
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
?b =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (η A) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A))
· # H (φ_adj_inv h g) = ?b
 
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
?b =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (η A) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A))
· # H (φ_adj_inv h g)

    apply φ_adj_inv_natural_postcomp.
  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'

τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K (η A) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A)
   · # R' (# H (φ_adj_inv h g))) =
φ_adj_inv h'
  (# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B)

A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧

# K (η A) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A)
· # R' (# H (φ_adj_inv h g)) =
# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B

R': C' ⟶ D'

K: D ⟶ D'

hs: has_homsets C'

A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
# K (η A) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A)
· # R' (# H (φ_adj_inv h g)) =
# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B

B: C

Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
# K (η A) · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A)
· # R' (# H (φ_adj_inv h g)) = ?b

· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A)
   · # R' (# H (φ_adj_inv h g))) = ?b

# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A)
· # R' (# H (φ_adj_inv h g)) = ?f'

    
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'

# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
?f' =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ (L A)
· # R' (# H (φ_adj_inv h g))

    apply Hτ.

# K (η A) · (# (R ∙ K) (φ_adj_inv h g) · τ B) =
# K g · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B

# K (η A) · # (R ∙ K) (φ_adj_inv h g) = # K g

C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D

# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f

# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f

C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
?b = # K (η A) · # K (# R (φ_adj_inv h g))

    use functor_comp.
  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
# K (η A · # R (φ_adj_inv h g)) = # K g

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
η A · # R (φ_adj_inv h g) = g

  (* Locate "·". *)
  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
τ: DistrLaw K H R R'
A: D
B: C
g: D ⟦ A, R B ⟧
η:= unit_from_are_adjoints h: functor_identity D ⟹ L ∙ R
Hτ:= nat_trans_ax τ: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ x' = τ x · # (H ∙ R') f
η A · # R (φ_adj_inv h g) = g

  apply φ_adj_after_φ_adj_inv.
Qed.

Definition τ_data_from_σ {C C' D D' : category} {L : functor D C} {R : functor C D}
           {L' : functor D' C'} {R' : functor C' D'} {H : functor C C'} {K : functor D D' }
           (h : are_adjoints L R) (h' : are_adjoints L' R') (σ : DistrLaw L' L K H) :
  DistrLaw_data K H R R' :=
  λ B : C, φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R B) · #H (counit_from_are_adjoints h B)).


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
is_nat_trans (R ∙ K) (H ∙ R') (τ_data_from_σ h h' σ)


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
is_nat_trans (R ∙ K) (H ∙ R') (τ_data_from_σ h h' σ)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ K) f · τ_data_from_σ h h' σ x' =
τ_data_from_σ h h' σ x · # (H ∙ R') f

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (R ∙ K) f · τ_data_from_σ h h' σ c' =
τ_data_from_σ h h' σ c · # (H ∙ R') f

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (R ∙ K) f
· φ_adj h'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')
     · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c')) =
φ_adj h'
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c)
   · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c))
· # (H ∙ R') f

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (R ∙ K) f
· φ_adj h'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')
     · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c')) = ?b
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
?b =
φ_adj h'
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c)
   · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c))
· # (H ∙ R') f

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (R ∙ K) f
· φ_adj h'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')
     · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c')) = ?b
 
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
?b =
# (R ∙ K) f
· φ_adj h'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')
     · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c'))

    
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
?b =
# K (# R f)
· φ_adj h'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')
     · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c'))

    apply φ_adj_natural_precomp.
  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
φ_adj h'
  (# L' (# K (# R f))
   · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')
      · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c'))) =
φ_adj h'
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c)
   · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c))
· # (H ∙ R') f

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
φ_adj h'
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c)
   · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c))
· # (H ∙ R') f =
φ_adj h'
  (# L' (# K (# R f))
   · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')
      · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c')))

σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
φ_adj h'
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c)
   · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c))
· # (H ∙ R') f = ?b

C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D

R': C' ⟶ D'

h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
Hσ:= nat_trans_ax σ: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (K ∙ L') f · σ x' = σ x · # (L ∙ H) f
?b =
# L' (# K (# R f))
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')
   · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c'))

# (K ∙ L') f · σ x' = σ x · # (L ∙ H) f
?b =
# (K ∙ L') (# R f)
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')
   · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c'))

· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')

# (K ∙ L') f · σ x' = σ x · # (L ∙ H) f
?f =
# (K ∙ L') (# R f)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c')

    
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
Hσ:= nat_trans_ax σ: ∏ (x x' : D) (f : D ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (K ∙ L') f · σ x' = σ x · # (L ∙ H) f
# (K ∙ L') (# R f)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R c') = ?f

    apply Hσ.

· # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c) · # H f =
σ (R c) · # (L ∙ H) (# R f)
· # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c')

# H (# (R ∙ L) f)
· # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c')

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
?b =
# H (# (R ∙ L) f)
· # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c')
 apply (functor_comp H). 
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# H (counit_from_are_adjoints h c · f) =
# H (# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h c')

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
counit_from_are_adjoints h c · f =
# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h c'

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
Hη:= nat_trans_ax (counit_from_are_adjoints h): ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h x' =
counit_from_are_adjoints h x
· # (functor_identity C) f
counit_from_are_adjoints h c · f =
# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h c'

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
Hη:= nat_trans_ax (counit_from_are_adjoints h): ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h x' =
counit_from_are_adjoints h x
· # (functor_identity C) f
# (R ∙ L) f · counit_from_are_adjoints h c' =
counit_from_are_adjoints h c · f

  apply Hη.
Qed.


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
DistrLaw K H R R'


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
DistrLaw K H R R'

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
is_nat_trans (R ∙ K) (H ∙ R') (τ_data_from_σ h h' σ)

  apply is_nat_trans_τ_data_from_σ.
Defined.


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
are_conjugates h h' σ (τ_from_σ h h' σ)


C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
are_conjugates h h' σ (τ_from_σ h h' σ)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
∏ (A : D) (B : C) (f : C ⟦ L A, B ⟧),
φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H f) =
# K (φ_adj h f)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (τ_from_σ h h' σ) B

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
A: D
B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H g) =
# K (φ_adj h g)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (τ_from_σ h h' σ) B

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
A: D
B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H g) =
# K (φ_adj h g) · τ_data_from_σ h h' σ B

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
A: D
B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H g) =
# K (φ_adj h g)
· φ_adj h'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R B)
     · # H (counit_from_are_adjoints h B))

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
A: D
B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H g) =
# K (φ_adj h g)
· φ_adj h'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R B) · # H (ε B))

L: D ⟶ C

A: D
B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H g) =
?b

    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R B) · # H (ε B))

# K (φ_adj h g)
· φ_adj h'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R B) · # H (ε B))
 apply φ_adj_natural_precomp. 
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
A: D
B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
φ_adj h' (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H g) =
φ_adj h'
  (# L' (# K (φ_adj h g))
   · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R B)
      · # H (ε B)))

σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
A: D
B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H g =
# L' (# K (φ_adj h g))
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R B) · # H (ε B))

nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ A · # H g = ?b

· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R B) · # H (ε B))

· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ (R B) = ?f

    apply Hσ.

?b = # H (# L (φ_adj h g)) · # H (ε B)

B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
?b = # H (# L (φ_adj h g)) · # H (ε B)
 apply (functor_comp H).

L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D

R': C' ⟶ D'

K: D ⟶ D'

A: D
B: C

# H g = # H (# L (φ_adj h g) · ε B)

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'

K: D ⟶ D'

σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
A: D
B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
