g = # L (φ_adj h g) · ε B

  
C, C', D, D': category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
L': D' ⟶ C'
R': C' ⟶ D'
H: C ⟶ C'
K: D ⟶ D'
h: are_adjoints L R
h': are_adjoints L' R'
hs: has_homsets C'
σ: DistrLaw L' L K H
A: D
B: C
g: C ⟦ L A, B ⟧
ε:= counit_from_are_adjoints h: R ∙ L ⟹ functor_identity C
# L (φ_adj h g) · ε B = g

  apply φ_adj_inv_after_φ_adj.
Qed.

End Conjugates.

Section Liftings.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
HH: FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G
UU


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
HH: FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G
UU

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
HH: FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G
UF:= forget_algebras F: category_FunctorAlg F ⟶ C
UU

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
HH: FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G
UF:= forget_algebras F: category_FunctorAlg F ⟶ C
UG:= forget_algebras G: category_FunctorAlg G ⟶ D
UU

  exact (UF ∙ H = HH ∙ UG).
Defined.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
FunctorAlg F → FunctorAlg G


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
FunctorAlg F → FunctorAlg G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
FunctorAlg G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
A:= alg_carrier F Aa: C
FunctorAlg G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
A:= alg_carrier F Aa: C
a:= alg_map F Aa: C ⟦ F (alg_carrier F Aa), alg_carrier F Aa ⟧
FunctorAlg G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
A:= alg_carrier F Aa: C
a:= alg_map F Aa: C ⟦ F (alg_carrier F Aa), alg_carrier F Aa ⟧
B:= H A: D
FunctorAlg G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
A:= alg_carrier F Aa: C
a:= alg_map F Aa: C ⟦ F (alg_carrier F Aa), alg_carrier F Aa ⟧
B:= H A: D
b:= nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda A · # H a: D ⟦ (H ∙ G) A, H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧
FunctorAlg G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
A:= alg_carrier F Aa: C
a:= alg_map F Aa: C ⟦ F (alg_carrier F Aa), alg_carrier F Aa ⟧
B:= H A: D
b:= nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda A · # H a: D ⟦ (H ∙ G) A, H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧
D
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
A:= alg_carrier F Aa: C
a:= alg_map F Aa: C ⟦ F (alg_carrier F Aa), alg_carrier F Aa ⟧
B:= H A: D
b:= nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda A · # H a: D ⟦ (H ∙ G) A, H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧
(λ x : D,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         (algebra_disp_cat G))) x) 
  ?pr1

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
A:= alg_carrier F Aa: C
a:= alg_map F Aa: C ⟦ F (alg_carrier F Aa), alg_carrier F Aa ⟧
B:= H A: D
b:= nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda A · # H a: D ⟦ (H ∙ G) A, H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧
D
 exact B.
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
A:= alg_carrier F Aa: C
a:= alg_map F Aa: C ⟦ F (alg_carrier F Aa), alg_carrier F Aa ⟧
B:= H A: D
b:= nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda A · # H a: D ⟦ (H ∙ G) A, H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧
(λ x : D,
 Core.ob_disp
   (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
      (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
         (algebra_disp_cat G))) x) B
 exact b.
Defined.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
is_algebra_mor G
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda Aa)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda Bb)
  (# H h)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
is_algebra_mor G
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda Aa)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda Bb)
  (# H h)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
alg_map G
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda Aa)
· # H h =
# G (# H h)
· alg_map G
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda Bb)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · # H h =
# G (# H h)
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · # H h =
# G (# H h)
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
# G (# H h)
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb)) =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · # H h

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
# G (# H h)
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb)) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
?b =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · 
# H h

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
# G (# H h)
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb)) = ?b
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
# G (# H h)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
    (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb) = ?b

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
# G (# H h)
· nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
    (alg_carrier F Bb) = ?f'

    apply ax. 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
lambda (alg_carrier F Aa) · # (F ∙ H) h
· # H (alg_map F Bb) =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · # H h

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
lambda (alg_carrier F Aa)
· (# (F ∙ H) h · # H (alg_map F Bb)) =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · # H h

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · # H h =
lambda (alg_carrier F Aa)
· (# (F ∙ H) h · # H (alg_map F Bb))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · (# H (alg_map F Aa) · # H h) =
lambda (alg_carrier F Aa)
· (# (F ∙ H) h · # H (alg_map F Bb))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
# H (alg_map F Aa) · # H h =
# (F ∙ H) h · # H (alg_map F Bb)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
# H (alg_map F Aa) · # H h =
# (F ∙ H) h · # H (alg_map F Bb)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
# H (alg_map F Aa · h) =
# (F ∙ H) h · # H (alg_map F Bb)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
# (F ∙ H) h · # H (alg_map F Bb) =
# H (alg_map F Aa · h)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
# H (# F h) · # H (alg_map F Bb) =
# H (alg_map F Aa · h)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
# H (# F h) · # H (alg_map F Bb) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
?b = # H (alg_map F Aa · h)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
# H (# F h) · # H (alg_map F Bb) = ?b
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
?b = # H (# F h) · # H (alg_map F Bb)

    apply (functor_comp H). 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
# H (# F h · alg_map F Bb) = # H (alg_map F Aa · h)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
# F h · alg_map F Bb = alg_map F Aa · h

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: algebra_ob F
h: algebra_mor F Aa Bb
ax:= nat_trans_ax lambda: ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H ∙ G) f · lambda x' = lambda x · # (F ∙ H) f
h_commutes:= algebra_mor_commutes F Aa Bb h: alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb
alg_map F Aa · h = # F h · alg_map F Bb

  apply h_commutes.
Qed.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg G)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg G)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
FunctorAlg F → FunctorAlg G
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
∏ a b : FunctorAlg F,
FunctorAlg F ⟦ a, b ⟧ → FunctorAlg G ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
FunctorAlg F → FunctorAlg G
 apply (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda).
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
∏ a b : FunctorAlg F,
FunctorAlg F ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ FunctorAlg G
  ⟦ lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda a,
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda b ⟧
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
∏ a b : ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧,
(∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 a, pr1 b ⟧, pr2 a · f = # F f · pr2 b)
→ ∑
  f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F a), H (alg_carrier F b) ⟧,
  nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
    (alg_carrier F a) · # H (alg_map F a) · f =
  # G f
  · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
       (alg_carrier F b) · # H (alg_map F b))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧
(∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
 pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb)
→ ∑
  f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa), H (alg_carrier F Bb) ⟧,
  nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
    (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
  # G f
  · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
       (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb
∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa), H (alg_carrier F Bb) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb
∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa), H (alg_carrier F Bb) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb
D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa), H (alg_carrier F Bb) ⟧
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb
(λ f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa), 
       H (alg_carrier F Bb) ⟧,
 nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
   (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
 # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
 # G f
 · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
      (alg_carrier F Bb) · 
    # H (alg_map F Bb))) 
  ?pr1

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb
D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa), H (alg_carrier F Bb) ⟧
 exact (#H (pr1 h)).
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb: ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧
h: ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb
(λ f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa), H (alg_carrier F Bb)
       ⟧,
 nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
   (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
 # G f
 · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
      (alg_carrier F Bb) · # H (alg_map F Bb)))
  (# H (pr1 h))
 apply lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux.
Defined.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
is_functor (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)

H: C ⟶ D

G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
# (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda) (identity Aa) =
identity (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda Aa)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
# (make_functor_data
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda)
     (λ (Aa Bb : ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧)
      (h : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
           pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb),
      # H (pr1 h),,
      lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb h))
  (identity Aa) =
identity
  (make_functor_data
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda)
     (λ (Aa Bb : ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧)
      (h : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
           pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb),
      # H (pr1 h),,
      lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb h)
     Aa)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
# H (identity (pr1 Aa)),,
lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Aa
  (identity (pr1 Aa),, Core.id_disp (pr2 Aa)) =
identity (H (alg_carrier F Aa)),,
Core.id_disp
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
   # H (alg_map F Aa)): Type
# H (identity (pr1 Aa)),,
lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Aa
  (identity (pr1 Aa),, Core.id_disp (pr2 Aa)) =
identity (H (alg_carrier F Aa)),,
Core.id_disp
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
   # H (alg_map F Aa)): Type
pr1
  (# H (identity (pr1 Aa)),,
   lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Aa
     (identity (pr1 Aa),, Core.id_disp (pr2 Aa))) =
pr1
  (identity (H (alg_carrier F Aa)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa)))
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
   # H (alg_map F Aa)): Type
transportf
  (λ x : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
         H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
   # H (alg_map F Aa) · x =
   # G x
   · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
      # H (alg_map F Aa))) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (# H (identity (pr1 Aa)),,
      lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Aa
        (identity (pr1 Aa),, Core.id_disp (pr2 Aa)))) =
pr2
  (identity (H (alg_carrier F Aa)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
      # H (alg_map F Aa)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
   # H (alg_map F Aa)): Type
transportf
  (λ x : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
         H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · x =
   # G x
   · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa))) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (# H (identity (pr1 Aa)),,
      lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Aa
        (identity (pr1 Aa),, Core.id_disp (pr2 Aa)))) =
pr2
  (identity (H (alg_carrier F Aa)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa)))
 apply homset_property. 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
   # H (alg_map F Aa)): Type
pr1
  (# H (identity (pr1 Aa)),,
   lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Aa
     (identity (pr1 Aa),, Core.id_disp (pr2 Aa))) =
pr1
  (identity (H (alg_carrier F Aa)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa)))


    (*Locate algebra_mor_eq.*)
(*    + assumption. *)
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa: FunctorAlg F
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Aa) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
   # H (alg_map F Aa)): Type
# H (identity (pr1 Aa)) =
identity (H (alg_carrier F Aa))

    apply functor_id.
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
functor_compax (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb, Cc: FunctorAlg F
f: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Aa, Bb ⟧
g: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Bb, Cc ⟧
# (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda) (f · g) =
# (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda) f
· # (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda) g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb, Cc: FunctorAlg F
f: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Aa, Bb ⟧
g: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Bb, Cc ⟧
# (make_functor_data
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda)
     (λ (Aa Bb : ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧)
      (h : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
           pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb),
      # H (pr1 h),,
      lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb h))
  (f · g) =
# (make_functor_data
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda)
     (λ (Aa Bb : ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧)
      (h : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
           pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb),
      # H (pr1 h),,
      lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb h))
  f
· # (make_functor_data
       (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda)
       (λ (Aa Bb : ∑ x : C, C ⟦ F x, x ⟧)
        (h : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr1 Aa, pr1 Bb ⟧,
             pr2 Aa · f = # F f · pr2 Bb),
        # H (pr1 h),,
        lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb h))
    g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb, Cc: FunctorAlg F
f: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Aa, Bb ⟧
g: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Bb, Cc ⟧
# H (pr1 f · pr1 g),,
lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Cc
  (pr1 f · pr1 g,, Core.comp_disp (pr2 f) (pr2 g)) =
# H (pr1 f) · # H (pr1 g),,
Core.comp_disp
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb f)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Bb Cc g)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb, Cc: FunctorAlg F
f: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Aa, Bb ⟧
g: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Bb, Cc ⟧
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Cc) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Cc) · 
   # H (alg_map F Cc)): Type
# H (pr1 f · pr1 g),,
lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Cc
  (pr1 f · pr1 g,, Core.comp_disp (pr2 f) (pr2 g)) =
# H (pr1 f) · # H (pr1 g),,
Core.comp_disp
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb f)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Bb Cc g)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb, Cc: FunctorAlg F
f: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Aa, Bb ⟧
g: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Bb, Cc ⟧
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Cc) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Cc) · 
   # H (alg_map F Cc)): Type
pr1
  (# H (pr1 f · pr1 g),,
   lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Cc
     (pr1 f · pr1 g,, Core.comp_disp (pr2 f) (pr2 g))) =
pr1
  (# H (pr1 f) · # H (pr1 g),,
   Core.comp_disp
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb f)
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Bb Cc g))
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb, Cc: FunctorAlg F
f: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Aa, Bb ⟧
g: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Bb, Cc ⟧
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Cc) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Cc) · 
   # H (alg_map F Cc)): Type
transportf
  (λ x : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
         H (alg_carrier F Cc) ⟧,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · 
   # H (alg_map F Aa) · x =
   # G x
   · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F Cc) · 
      # H (alg_map F Cc))) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (# H (pr1 f · pr1 g),,
      lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Cc
        (pr1 f · pr1 g,,
         Core.comp_disp (pr2 f) (pr2 g)))) =
pr2
  (# H (pr1 f) · # H (pr1 g),,
   Core.comp_disp
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb f)
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Bb Cc g))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb, Cc: FunctorAlg F
f: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Aa, Bb ⟧
g: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Bb, Cc ⟧
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Cc) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Cc) · 
   # H (alg_map F Cc)): Type
transportf
  (λ x : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
         H (alg_carrier F Cc) ⟧,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · x =
   # G x
   · (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F Cc) · # H (alg_map F Cc))) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (# H (pr1 f · pr1 g),,
      lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Cc
        (pr1 f · pr1 g,,
         Core.comp_disp (pr2 f) (pr2 g)))) =
pr2
  (# H (pr1 f) · # H (pr1 g),,
   Core.comp_disp
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb f)
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Bb Cc g))
 apply homset_property. 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb, Cc: FunctorAlg F
f: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Aa, Bb ⟧
g: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Bb, Cc ⟧
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Cc) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Cc) · 
   # H (alg_map F Cc)): Type
pr1
  (# H (pr1 f · pr1 g),,
   lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Cc
     (pr1 f · pr1 g,, Core.comp_disp (pr2 f) (pr2 g))) =
pr1
  (# H (pr1 f) · # H (pr1 g),,
   Core.comp_disp
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Aa Bb f)
     (lifting_from_distr_law_data_aux lambda Bb Cc g))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Aa, Bb, Cc: FunctorAlg F
f: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Aa, Bb ⟧
g: FunctorAlg F ⟦ Bb, Cc ⟧
TYPE:= ∑
f : D ⟦ H (alg_carrier F Aa),
    H (alg_carrier F Cc) ⟧,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
  (alg_carrier F Aa) · # H (alg_map F Aa) · f =
# G f
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
     (alg_carrier F Cc) · 
   # H (alg_map F Cc)): Type
# H (pr1 f · pr1 g) = # H (pr1 f) · # H (pr1 g)

    apply functor_comp.
Qed.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg G)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
(λ F0 : functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg G),
 is_functor F0) ?pr1

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg G)
 apply (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda).
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
(λ F0 : functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg G),
 is_functor F0) (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
 apply is_functor_lifting_from_distr_law_data.
Defined.




C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
is_lifting H (lifting_from_distr_law lambda)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
is_lifting H (lifting_from_distr_law lambda)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
forget_algebras F ∙ H =
lifting_from_distr_law lambda ∙ forget_algebras G

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Hλ:= lifting_from_distr_law lambda: FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G
forget_algebras F ∙ H = Hλ ∙ forget_algebras G

  (*UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type.*)
  (*Locate "⟶".*)
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Hλ:= lifting_from_distr_law lambda: FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G
has_homsets D
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Hλ:= lifting_from_distr_law lambda: FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G
pr1 (forget_algebras F ∙ H) =
pr1 (Hλ ∙ forget_algebras G)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Hλ:= lifting_from_distr_law lambda: FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G
has_homsets D
 apply D.
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ C
G: D ⟶ D
H: C ⟶ D
lambda: DistrLaw G F H H
Hλ:= lifting_from_distr_law lambda: FunctorAlg F ⟶ FunctorAlg G
pr1 (forget_algebras F ∙ H) =
pr1 (Hλ ∙ forget_algebras G)
 apply idpath.
Qed.

(** a simple preparation for the next lemma - strictly speaking, not even needed *)
Ltac get_sides_of_eq := match goal with |- @paths _ ?L ?R => set (left := L); set (right := R) end.

Arguments idtomor {_ _ _ } _.

(** unnamed result by Hinze & Wu, mentioned in their Sect. 3.2.1 *)

C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
lifting_from_distr_law lambda
∙ lifting_from_distr_law lambda' =
lifting_from_distr_law
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)


C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
lifting_from_distr_law lambda
∙ lifting_from_distr_law lambda' =
lifting_from_distr_law
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
has_homsets (FunctorAlg F'')
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
pr1
  (lifting_from_distr_law lambda
   ∙ lifting_from_distr_law lambda') =
pr1
  (lifting_from_distr_law
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda))

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
has_homsets (FunctorAlg F'')
 apply homset_property. 
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
pr1
  (lifting_from_distr_law lambda
   ∙ lifting_from_distr_law lambda') =
pr1
  (lifting_from_distr_law
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda))

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda') =
lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left = right

  (* we have to read the expressions back, so as to get functor_data between precategories: *)
  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left = right

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left = right

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left' ~ right'
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= ?Goal: left' ~ right'
left = right

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left' ~ right'
 
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
alg: FunctorAlg F
left' alg = right' alg

    
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
alg: FunctorAlg F
lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda alg) =
lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg
 
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
alg: FunctorAlg F
H'
  (alg_carrier F'
     (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
      nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F alg) · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
  (alg_carrier F'
     (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
      nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
        (alg_carrier F alg) · # H (alg_map F alg)))
· # H'
    (alg_map F'
       (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
        nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
          (alg_carrier F alg) · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
(H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) (alg_carrier F alg)
· # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg)
 
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
alg: FunctorAlg F
H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),,
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
  (H (alg_carrier F alg))
· # H'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
       (alg_carrier F alg) · # H (alg_map F alg)) =
H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),,
identity (F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))))
· (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H (alg_carrier F alg))
   · (identity (H' (F' (H (alg_carrier F alg))))
      · # (pr1 H') (pr1 lambda (alg_carrier F alg)))
   · identity (H' (H (F (alg_carrier F alg)))))
· # H' (# H (alg_map F alg))

    (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
    
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
alg: FunctorAlg F
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
  (H (alg_carrier F alg))
· # H'
    (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
       (alg_carrier F alg) · # H (alg_map F alg)) =
identity (F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))))
· (pr1 lambda' (pr1 H (alg_carrier F alg))
   · (identity (H' (F' (H (alg_carrier F alg))))
      · # (pr1 H') (pr1 lambda (alg_carrier F alg)))
   · identity (H' (H (F (alg_carrier F alg)))))
· # H' (# H (alg_map F alg))

    abstract ( repeat rewrite id_left; rewrite id_right; rewrite <- assoc; apply maponpaths; apply functor_comp ).
  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
left = right

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
is_nat_trans left' right'
  (λ c : FunctorAlg F, idtomor (okonobs c))

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'

  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)

  (Total.total_category_ob_mor

  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
∏ (x x' : FunctorAlg F) (f : FunctorAlg F ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# left' f · idtomor (okonobs x') =
idtomor (okonobs x) · # right' f

okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,

       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
# left' m · idtomor (okonobs alg2) =
idtomor (okonobs alg1) · # right' m

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)

  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)

:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))

    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
pr1 (# left' m · idtomor (okonobs alg2)) =
pr1 (idtomor (okonobs alg1) · # right' m)

okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'

        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,

       alg) =

    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
# H' (# H (pr1 m)) · pr1 (idtomor (okonobs alg2)) =
pr1 (idtomor (okonobs alg1)) · # H' (# H (pr1 m))

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'

okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),

      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)

        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'

        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'

           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :

    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =

    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)

okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
?b = pr1 (idtomor (okonobs alg1)) · # H' (# H (pr1 m))

F'': C'' ⟶ C''

lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'

  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)

     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor

     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'

    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
?f = pr1 (idtomor (okonobs alg1))

   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'

:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
TYPE:= C'' ⟦ H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)),
H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)) ⟧: UU
pr1 (idtomor (okonobs alg1)) = ?f

    apply (idtomor_FunctorAlg_commutes _ _ _ (okonobs alg1)).

      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof

   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =

 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
# H' (# H (pr1 m))
· idtomor
    (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg2)) =
idtomor (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1))
· # H' (# H (pr1 m))

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data

     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))

  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')

  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
idtomor (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
× idtomor
    (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg2)) =
  identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2))

            ⟦ F''

 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
Hyp: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
× idtomor

  identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2))
# H' (# H (pr1 m))
· idtomor

· # H' (# H (pr1 m))

left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data

     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))

okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'')
     (maponpaths
        (λ p : C''
               ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1))),
               H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)) ⟧,
         H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)),, p)
        (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C
           C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda' alg1))) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))

H: C ⟶ C'

lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'

  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor

okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'

   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :

    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =

    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'

idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'')
     (maponpaths
        (λ p : C''
               ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2))),
               H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)) ⟧,

        (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C

C, C', C'': category

H: C ⟶ C'

lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')

  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
maponpaths (alg_carrier F'')
  (maponpaths
     (λ p : C'' ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C C'
        C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda' alg1)) = 
?t2

        apply (maponpathscomp (λ p :
       C'' ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1))), H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)) ⟧,
       tpair (fun X: C'' => C'' ⟦ F'' X, X ⟧)
             (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1))) p)
                              (alg_carrier F'')).
      
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''

  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)

okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
idtomor
  (maponpaths
     (alg_carrier F''
      ∘ (λ p : C''
               ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1))),
               H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)) ⟧,
         H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)),, p))%functions
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C C'
        C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda' alg1)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))

      
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
idtomor
  (maponpaths
     (λ x : C'' ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)) ⟧,
      alg_carrier F''
        (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)),, x))
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C C'
        C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda' alg1)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))

okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,

     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''

     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof

   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)

    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
idtomor
  (maponpaths
     (λ _ : C'' ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)))
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C C'

left' ~ right': left' ~ right'

m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
idtomor (idpath (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg1)))) =

      apply idpath.

   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
maponpaths (alg_carrier F'')
  (maponpaths
     (λ p : C'' ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C C'
        C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda' alg2)) = 
?t2

        apply (maponpathscomp (λ p :
       C'' ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2))), H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)) ⟧,
       tpair (fun X: C'' => C'' ⟦ F'' X, X ⟧)
             (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2))) p)
                              (alg_carrier F'')).
      
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
idtomor
  (maponpaths
     (alg_carrier F''
      ∘ (λ p : C''
               ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2))),
               H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)) ⟧,
         H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)),, p))%functions
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C C'
        C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda' alg2)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2))

      
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))

  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
idtomor
  (maponpaths
     (λ x : C'' ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)) ⟧,
      alg_carrier F''
        (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)),, x))
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C C'
        C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda' alg2)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2))

        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'

  (maponpaths
     (λ _ : C'' ⟦ F'' (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2))),

     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof C C'

 ((maponpaths

            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),

      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof

        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =

 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
idtomor (idpath (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)))) =
identity (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg2)))

      apply idpath.
  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H

  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data

     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))

  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
