  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
Hyp: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
× idtomor
    (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg2)) =
  identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2))
# H' (# H (pr1 m))
· idtomor
    (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg2)) =
idtomor (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1))
· # H' (# H (pr1 m))

functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'

           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans

    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
Hyp1: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
Hyp2: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg2)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2))
# H' (# H (pr1 m))
· idtomor
    (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg2)) =
idtomor (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1))
· # H' (# H (pr1 m))

  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)

     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
Hyp1: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
Hyp2: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg2)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2))
# H' (# H (pr1 m))
· identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
· # H' (# H (pr1 m))

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
Hyp1: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
Hyp2: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg2)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2))
# H' (# H (pr1 m)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
· # H' (# H (pr1 m))

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C
F': C' ⟶ C'
F'': C'' ⟶ C''
H: C ⟶ C'
H': C' ⟶ C''
lambda: DistrLaw F' F H H
lambda': DistrLaw F'' F' H' H'
left:= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F))
  (Total.total_category_ob_mor
     (algebra_disp_cat_data F''))
right:= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
left':= functor_composite_data
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda)
  (lifting_from_distr_law_data lambda'): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
right':= lifting_from_distr_law_data
  (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
:
functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F''): functor_data (FunctorAlg F) (FunctorAlg F'')
okonobs:= (λ alg : FunctorAlg F,
 ((maponpaths
     (λ p : C''
            ⟦ F''
                (H' (H (alg_carrier F alg))),
            H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)) ⟧,
      H' (H (alg_carrier F alg)),, p)
     (liftings_from_distr_laws_compose_subproof
        C C' C'' F F' F'' H H' lambda lambda'
        alg)
   :
   H'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg))),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda'
     (alg_carrier F'
        (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
         nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans lambda
           (alg_carrier F alg)
         · # H (alg_map F alg)))
   · # H'
       (alg_map F'
          (H (alg_carrier F alg),,
           nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
             lambda (alg_carrier F alg)
           · # H (alg_map F alg))) =
   (H ∙ H') (alg_carrier F alg),,
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans
     (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda)
     (alg_carrier F alg)
   · # (H ∙ H') (alg_map F alg))
  :
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda'
    (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob lambda
       alg) =
  lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob
    (comp_distr_laws lambda' lambda) alg)
 :
 left' alg = right' alg)
:
left' ~ right': left' ~ right'
alg1, alg2: FunctorAlg F
m: FunctorAlg F ⟦ alg1, alg2 ⟧
Hyp1: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg1)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
Hyp2: idtomor
  (maponpaths (alg_carrier F'') (okonobs alg2)) =
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg2))
identity (alg_carrier F'' (left' alg1))
· # H' (# H (pr1 m)) = # H' (# H (pr1 m))

  apply id_left.
Qed.

End Liftings.

Section AdjointFolds.

(* the conclusion of the following theorem is done after the example of [UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.GenMendlerIteration], and its proof is divided in the same way *)

Local Notation "↓ f" := (mor_from_algebra_mor _ f) (at level 3, format "↓ f").
(* in Agda mode \downarrow *)


Context {C D: category}
  {L: functor D C} {R: functor C D}  (h : are_adjoints L R) {CC: functor C C} {DD: functor D D}
  (μDD_Initial : Initial (FunctorAlg DD))
  {σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC} {τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R} (hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ)
  {B: C} (b: CC B --> B).

Let AF := FunctorAlg CC.


C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
A: C
a: C ⟦ CC A, A ⟧
AF


C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
A: C
a: C ⟦ CC A, A ⟧
AF

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
A: C
a: C ⟦ CC A, A ⟧
Core.ob_disp
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        (algebra_disp_cat CC))) B

  exact b.
Defined.

Let μDD: D := alg_carrier _ (InitialObject μDD_Initial).
(* Locate InitialObject. *)
Let inDD: DD(μDD) --> μDD := alg_map _ (InitialObject μDD_Initial).



C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C

μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧

AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x:= φ_adj_inv h
  ↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
      (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))): C ⟦ L (alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial),
alg_carrier CC (AlgConstr B b) ⟧
C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧

  exact x.
Defined.


C, D: category

h: are_adjoints L R

inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
algebra_mor DD μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))

pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) ⟧

h: are_adjoints L R

hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ

AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
(λ f : D ⟦ pr1 μDD_Initial,
       pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 μDD_Initial)
   (pr2 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))) f)
  ?pr1

h: are_adjoints L R

μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
D ⟦ pr1 μDD_Initial,
pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) ⟧
 exact (φ_adj h traho_of_Hinze_Wu).
  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C

(λ f : D ⟦ pr1 μDD_Initial,
       pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 μDD_Initial)
   (pr2 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))) f)
  (φ_adj h traho_of_Hinze_Wu)
 
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C

h: are_adjoints L R

AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category

inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
pr2
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        (algebra_disp_cat DD))) (pr1 μDD_Initial)
  (pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))
  (pr2 μDD_Initial)
  (pr2 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))
  (φ_adj h traho_of_Hinze_Wu)

  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        (algebra_disp_cat DD))) (pr1 μDD_Initial)
  (pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))
  (pr2 μDD_Initial)
  (pr2 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))
  (φ_adj h
     (φ_adj_inv h
        ↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
            (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))))

    
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
pr2
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        (algebra_disp_cat DD))) (pr1 μDD_Initial)
  (pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))
  (pr2 μDD_Initial)
  (pr2 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))
  ↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
      (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))

    apply (algebra_mor_commutes _ _ _ (InitialArrow μDD_Initial (lifting_from_distr_law_data_on_ob τ (AlgConstr B b)))).
Defined.


C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D

τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
# L inDD · traho_of_Hinze_Wu =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD
· # CC traho_of_Hinze_Wu · b


C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C

μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)

· # CC traho_of_Hinze_Wu · b

L: D ⟶ C

μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D

C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧

μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
?b =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD
· # CC traho_of_Hinze_Wu · b

# DD (φ_adj h traho_of_Hinze_Wu)
· (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B · # R b) =
inDD · φ_adj h traho_of_Hinze_Wu

  (*
  set (n := nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B · # R b).
  set (m := alg_map DD ((lifting_from_distr_law hsC hsD τ) (AlgConstr' B b))).
  simpl in m.
  change (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans τ B · # R b) with m.
   *)
  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
# DD (φ_adj h traho_of_Hinze_Wu)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h traho_of_Hinze_Wu

  (*Locate InitialArrow.*)

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
inDD · φ_adj h traho_of_Hinze_Wu =
# DD (φ_adj h traho_of_Hinze_Wu)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))

  apply  (algebra_mor_commutes DD _ _ φ_adj_traho_of_Hinze_Wu).
Qed.


C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
algebra_mor DD μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))


C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
algebra_mor DD μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))

L: D ⟶ C

h: are_adjoints L R

τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧

μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧

Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
D ⟦ pr1 μDD_Initial,
pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) ⟧
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
(λ f : D ⟦ pr1 μDD_Initial,
       pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 μDD_Initial)
   (pr2 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))) f)
  ?pr1

L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R

hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ

b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧

μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D

Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
D ⟦ pr1 μDD_Initial,
pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) ⟧
 exact (φ_adj h x).

L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D

    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =

(λ f : D ⟦ pr1 μDD_Initial,
       pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
       ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 μDD_Initial)
   (pr2 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))) f)

C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
pr2
  (Core.disp_cat_ob_mor_from_disp_cat_data
     (Core.disp_cat_data_from_disp_cat
        (algebra_disp_cat DD))) (pr1 μDD_Initial)
  (pr1 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))
  (pr2 μDD_Initial)
  (pr2 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))
  (φ_adj h x)

    
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
# DD (φ_adj h x)
· pr2 (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
pr2 μDD_Initial · φ_adj h x

    apply Hyp.
Defined.


C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
# DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
→ φ_adj h x =
  ↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
      (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))

C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
aux:= InitialArrowUnique μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
  (φ_adj_h_x x Hyp): φ_adj_h_x x Hyp =
InitialArrow μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
φ_adj h x =
↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
aux:= InitialArrowUnique μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
  (φ_adj_h_x x Hyp): φ_adj_h_x x Hyp =
InitialArrow μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
aux':= ↓(φ_adj_h_x x Hyp): D ⟦ alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial,
alg_carrier DD
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) ⟧
φ_adj h x =
↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R

σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ

b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
aux:= InitialArrowUnique μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
  (φ_adj_h_x x Hyp): φ_adj_h_x x Hyp =
InitialArrow μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
aux':= φ_adj h x: D ⟦ alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial, R B ⟧
φ_adj h x =
↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
aux:= InitialArrowUnique μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
  (φ_adj_h_x x Hyp): φ_adj_h_x x Hyp =
InitialArrow μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
aux':= φ_adj h x: D ⟦ alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial, R B ⟧
↓(φ_adj_h_x x Hyp) =
↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
Hyp: # DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x
aux:= InitialArrowUnique μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
  (φ_adj_h_x x Hyp): φ_adj_h_x x Hyp =
InitialArrow μDD_Initial
  (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))
aux':= φ_adj h x: D ⟦ alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial, R B ⟧
↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))) =
↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** The following formalizes Theorem 5.2 (Adjoint folds) of Hinze and Wu. *)

C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
∃! x : C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧,
# L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b


C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
∃! x : C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧,
# L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
∑
cntr : ∑ x : C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧,
       # L inDD · x =
       nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x
       · b,
∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧,
    # L inDD · x =
    nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b,
t = cntr

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧,
    # L inDD · x =
    nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b,
t = traho_of_Hinze_Wu,, traho_of_Hinze_Wu_ok


  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
t: ∑ x : C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧,
# L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
t = traho_of_Hinze_Wu,, traho_of_Hinze_Wu_ok

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
x,, hyp = traho_of_Hinze_Wu,, traho_of_Hinze_Wu_ok

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ

b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧

μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
x = traho_of_Hinze_Wu
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ

b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
same: x = traho_of_Hinze_Wu
x,, hyp = traho_of_Hinze_Wu,, traho_of_Hinze_Wu_ok

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
same: x = traho_of_Hinze_Wu
x,, hyp = traho_of_Hinze_Wu,, traho_of_Hinze_Wu_ok

    
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
same: x = traho_of_Hinze_Wu
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧,
   # L inDD · x =
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b)
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
same: x = traho_of_Hinze_Wu
pr1 (x,, hyp) =
pr1 (traho_of_Hinze_Wu,, traho_of_Hinze_Wu_ok)

    
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
same: x = traho_of_Hinze_Wu
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧,
   # L inDD · x =
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b)

L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧

hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
same: x = traho_of_Hinze_Wu
x0: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
isaprop
  (# L inDD · x0 =
   nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x0 · b)

      apply C.

pr1 (x,, hyp) =
pr1 (traho_of_Hinze_Wu,, traho_of_Hinze_Wu_ok)

      exact same.

C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D

B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
φ_adj h x =
φ_adj h
  (φ_adj_inv h
     ↓(InitialArrow μDD_Initial
         (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b))))

nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
# DD (φ_adj h x)
· alg_map DD
    (lifting_from_distr_law τ (AlgConstr B b)) =
inDD · φ_adj h x

x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
φ_adj h
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b) =
inDD · φ_adj h x

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
φ_adj h
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b) =
?b
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
?b = inDD · φ_adj h x

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
?b = inDD · φ_adj h x

    apply φ_adj_natural_precomp.
  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
φ_adj h
  (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b) =
φ_adj h (# L inDD · x)

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b =
# L inDD · x

  
C, D: category
L: D ⟶ C
R: C ⟶ D
h: are_adjoints L R
CC: C ⟶ C
DD: D ⟶ D
μDD_Initial: Initial (FunctorAlg DD)
σ: DistrLaw L L DD CC
τ: DistrLaw DD CC R R
hh: are_conjugates h h σ τ
B: C
b: C ⟦ CC B, B ⟧
AF:= FunctorAlg CC: category
μDD:= alg_carrier DD μDD_Initial: D
inDD:= alg_map DD μDD_Initial: D ⟦ DD μDD, μDD ⟧
x: C ⟦ L μDD, B ⟧
hyp: # L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b
# L inDD · x =
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans σ μDD · # CC x · b

  exact hyp.

Defined.

End AdjointFolds.
